ideas.title: Cheese Zips
ideas.description: Small cheese crackers — easy grab-and-go crunch.

ideas.title: Goldfish crackers
ideas.description: Classic fish-shaped cheddar crackers.

ideas.title: Cheese cubes
ideas.description: Mild cheddar or mozzarella cut into small cubes.

ideas.title: String cheese pieces
ideas.description: Pull into thin strips or bite-sized chunks.

ideas.title: Pretzel sticks
ideas.description: Thin rods — good for dipping in hummus or yogurt.

ideas.title: Animal crackers
ideas.description: Plain or lightly sweet — fun shapes.

ideas.title: Whole grain crackers
ideas.description: Square or round crackers; pair with cheese.

ideas.title: Mini rice cakes
ideas.description: Plain or lightly salted — top with thin nut butter if allowed.
ideas.tips: Check daycare nut policy before nut butters.

ideas.title: Veggie straws
ideas.description: Crunchy sticks — keep portion small.

ideas.title: Puffs (rice or corn)
ideas.description: Dissolve quickly — good for younger toddlers.

ideas.title: Deli turkey roll-ups
ideas.description: Rolled slices of turkey — no heating needed.

ideas.title: Mozzarella pearls
ideas.description: Small cheese balls — drain if packed in liquid.

ideas.title: Hummus with pita strips
ideas.description: Pack hummus in a small cup; soft pita triangles for dipping.

ideas.title: Mini banana muffin
ideas.description: Baked ahead; room-temperature mini muffin.

ideas.title: Teddy grahams
ideas.description: Honey or chocolate — small handful.

ideas.title: Blueberries
ideas.description: Fresh berries — smash lightly if your toddler is still learning to chew.

ideas.title: Grapes (quartered)
ideas.description: Seedless grapes cut lengthwise into quarters.
ideas.tips: Always quarter round grapes lengthwise for toddlers.

ideas.title: Mandarin segments
ideas.description: Peeled clementine or mandarin pieces.

ideas.title: Banana slices
ideas.description: Coins or half-moons — pack with a little lemon if browning bothers you.

ideas.title: Strawberry halves
ideas.description: Hull and halve (or quarter large berries).

ideas.title: Raspberries
ideas.description: Soft whole berries — smash if needed.

ideas.title: Melon cubes
ideas.description: Cantaloupe or honeydew — bite-sized cubes.

ideas.title: Apple slices
ideas.description: Thin slices; optional thin lemon water dip.

ideas.title: Peach slices
ideas.description: Ripe peach wedges — soft and easy to gum.

ideas.title: Soft dried apricots
ideas.description: Cut strips if pieces are large.

ideas.title: Freeze-dried fruit
ideas.description: Strawberry or mango chips — light and crunchy.

ideas.title: Cucumber coins
ideas.description: Thin rounds — cool and mild.

ideas.title: Carrot coins
ideas.description: Thin rounds; steam until soft if your toddler prefers softer veg.

ideas.title: Cherry tomatoes (quartered)
ideas.description: Sweet tomatoes cut into quarters.
ideas.tips: Quarter lengthwise — never serve whole cherry tomatoes to toddlers.

ideas.title: Sugar snap peas
ideas.description: String removed; whole or halved pods.

ideas.title: Steamed broccoli florets
ideas.description: Steam until tender, cool completely before packing.

ideas.title: Bell pepper strips
ideas.description: Red or orange strips — sweet and crunchy.

ideas.title: Shelled edamame
ideas.description: Steamed, cooled — soft protein-rich beans.

ideas.title: Avocado cubes
ideas.description: Ripe avocado — toss with a little lemon to slow browning.

ideas.title: Roasted sweet potato cubes
ideas.description: Roast until soft; serve at room temperature.

ideas.title: Steamed green beans
ideas.description: Trim ends; steam until bendable, then cool.

ideas.title: PB&J triangles
ideas.description: Small sandwich triangles — crusts optional.
ideas.tips: Use sunflower seed butter if your daycare is nut-free.

ideas.title: Rice balls (onigiri)
ideas.description: Plain sushi rice pressed into balls; optional furikake on top.

ideas.title: Mini quesadilla triangles
ideas.description: Cheese (and finely chopped veg) quesadilla cut into small wedges.

ideas.title: Tortilla pinwheels
ideas.description: Cream cheese or hummus spread, roll tight, slice into spirals.

ideas.title: Hard-boiled egg halves
ideas.description: Cool completely; pack with an ice pack.
ideas.tips: Keep cold — use an insulated bag and ice pack.

ideas.title: Turkey & cheese pinwheels
ideas.description: Soft tortilla with deli turkey and cheese, rolled and sliced.

ideas.title: Cold pasta salad
ideas.description: Small shapes with pesto, peas, and mozzarella — eats well cold.

ideas.title: Mini chicken nuggets
ideas.description: Baked nuggets — fine at room temp for a short window.
ideas.tips: Pack with ice pack; eat within a few hours.

ideas.title: Sunflower butter banana bites
ideas.description: Bread rounds with sunflower butter and thin banana — nut-free friendly.

ideas.title: Bean & cheese roll-ups
ideas.description: Mashed white beans and cheese in a soft tortilla, sliced.

ideas.title: Mini bagel with cream cheese
ideas.description: Halved mini bagel — spread cream cheese thinly.

ideas.title: Naan dippers with hummus
ideas.description: Soft naan strips for scooping hummus.

ideas.title: Finger sandwich squares
ideas.description: Ham, turkey, or cheese on soft bread — cut into tiny squares.

ideas.title: Broccoli & cheese quesadilla bites
ideas.description: Finely chopped broccoli in cheese quesadilla — small triangles.

ideas.title: Animal gummies
ideas.description: A few fruit gummies — keep portion tiny.

ideas.title: Mini chocolate chip cookie
ideas.description: One small homemade or store cookie.

ideas.title: Yogurt-covered raisins
ideas.description: Small scoop — chewy and sweet.

ideas.title: Fruit leather strip
ideas.description: Rolled or folded strip — no utensils.

ideas.title: Graham cracker bears
ideas.description: Honey or cinnamon — pair with fruit for balance.

ideas.title: Mini oatmeal cookie
ideas.description: Soft cookie — room temperature.

ideas.title: A few chocolate chips
ideas.description: Tiny portion mixed with crackers or fruit.

ideas.title: Smoothie melts
ideas.description: Freeze-dried yogurt bites — melt in the mouth.
